def eligible_for_certification_bonus(self) -> bool:
    is_eligible: bool = False
    if (self.employment_status == 'employed' and 
        self.education in ['bachelor', 'master', 'doctor'] and 
        self.job_level == 4 and 
        self.certifications_completed == 'yes'):
        is_eligible = True
    return is_eligible
